chapters.title: Welcome to Node.js
chapters.description: Discover what Node.js is, why it's revolutionary, and run your very first JavaScript on the server.

chapters.title: JavaScript Refresher
chapters.description: Brush up on modern JavaScript features essential for Node.js development.

chapters.title: Core Modules: fs, path, os
chapters.description: Work with the file system, handle paths, and get system info using built-in modules.

chapters.title: npm and Package Management
chapters.description: Master npm – install, update, and manage dependencies like a pro.

chapters.title: Asynchronous JavaScript: Callbacks, Promises, Async/Await
chapters.description: Tame async code with callbacks, promises, and modern async/await syntax.

chapters.title: Building a Web Server with HTTP
chapters.description: Create your own web server from scratch using Node's http module.

chapters.title: Express.js Framework
chapters.description: Supercharge your server with Express – the most popular Node framework.

chapters.title: Working with Databases
chapters.description: Connect to MongoDB or SQL databases and perform CRUD operations.

chapters.title: RESTful APIs
chapters.description: Design and build RESTful APIs following best practices.

chapters.title: Authentication and Authorization
chapters.description: Secure your apps with JWT, OAuth, and session management.

chapters.title: Error Handling and Debugging
chapters.description: Learn to gracefully handle errors and debug Node applications effectively.

chapters.title: Deployment and Production
chapters.description: Deploy your Node apps to the cloud, manage environment variables, and monitor performance.
